svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="p3mQNUYhKR3-NLNz7Ee8" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-479" dy="-108" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="910" pageHeight="360" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：双头输出 —— 共享主干，分出 policy 头与 value 头" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="870" x="20" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;size=8;" value="共享特征图
C × 10 × 9" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="36" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#2a5d9c;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="policy 头" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="100" x="200" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="1×1 Conv
BN · ReLU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="110" x="200" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pf" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="Flatten
+ Linear" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="100" x="332" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plogits" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="动作 logits
A = 8100" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="110" x="454" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pmask" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=11;" value="合法动作 mask
+ softmax
（Evaluator 处理）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="586" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pp" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="走子概率 p" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="120" x="748" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="value 头" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="100" x="200" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="1×1 Conv
BN · ReLU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="110" x="200" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vf" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="Flatten" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="90" x="332" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vfc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="FC → ReLU
→ FC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="110" x="442" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vtanh" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="tanh" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="70" x="574" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vv" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="价值 v ∈ [−1, 1]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="140" x="666" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bp" edge="1" parent="1" source="shared" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bv" edge="1" parent="1" source="shared" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pc" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="pf"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pf" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="plogits"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" edge="1" parent="1" source="plogits" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1.6;dashed=1;" target="pmask"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" edge="1" parent="1" source="pmask" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="pp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v1" edge="1" parent="1" source="vc" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="vf"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v2" edge="1" parent="1" source="vf" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="vfc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v3" edge="1" parent="1" source="vfc" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="vtanh"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v4" edge="1" parent="1" source="vtanh" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="vv"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="两个头共用主干输出的同一份特征图（多任务）。policy 头给每个动作打分（logits）→ 合法动作 mask + softmax → 概率，用来指导 MCTS；value 头评估当前局面胜负，tanh 压到 [−1,1]。mask/softmax 不在网络内，由 Evaluator 完成，这样训练时可直接用 logits 算交叉熵。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="870" x="20" y="304" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 两个头共用主干输出的同一份特征图（多任务）。policy 头给每个动作打分（logits）→ 合法动作 mask + softmax → 概率，用来指导 MCTS；value 头评估当前局面胜负，tanh 压到 [−1,1]。mask/softmax 不在网络内，由 Evaluator 完成，这样训练时可直接用 logits 算交叉熵。
